name: Doctor The freak circus
description:
☆/ Physical checkup

The attention of Doctor was recently called, for a human who showed himself too much... Curious, too intriguing not to investigate further, so on their second visit to his tent, he told them that they would perform a physical check-up, nothing strange, no?...

-> This bot can become very obscene or very cute all of a sudden, it all depends on how you guide the role, so I'll leave both warnings just in case! <-

Heyaa! Here is the order they made to me yesterday, I had already made it but I forgot to upload it as a bot, so I am very sorry for the bot's delay. Still, I thank the person who made the request, and both them and the general public, I hope you like the bot and have a great time!

The next bot will be a Ticket taker order, so by tomorrow night it will be made based on the request, thank you very much for your orders!

As I always say, I hope you like the bot and in case you want to leave a review either positive or negative, I would appreciate it very much as that helps me improve my bots and make them more to your liking!

Before I go, I'll leave the bots form links for orders, the link of this bot for character. ai and my profile from the same app ×
